name: Pine Meadow Golf Club
address: 4324 Fairfax Park Dr, Eau Claire, WI 54701
about: Pine Meadow Golf Club is a Par-3 course and indoor golf simulator venue in Eau Claire, WI, offering both outdoor and year-round indoor play. They feature two HD Golf simulators and provide club rentals for all sizes and both left and right-handed players. The venue also includes a full-service restaurant with a menu featuring items like a popular fish fry and pizzas. Pine Meadow offers simulator punch cards, group party packages, and a casual atmosphere suitable for various events and individual practice sessions.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round access to play regardless of weather conditions with HD simulators
Casual pace of play on the Par-3 course, playable in under 2 hours on foot
Convenient simulator punch card offer with 10 hours for the price of 8 and a free pizza with a 2-hour booking
Inclusive atmosphere with club rentals available for all skill levels and handedness

food_and_drink.notes: Full food menu available including a popular baked or fried fish fry, pizzas, and other menu items. A 12" one-topping pizza is included with a 2-hour simulator booking.
No mention of alcohol service on the website.

simulator_hardware.notes: High Definition digital golf rooms for year-round play

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, club rentals are available for all sizes and for both left and right-handed players.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue has a full-service kitchen and bar. A 12" one-topping pizza is included with a 2-hour simulator booking.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The outdoor Par-3 course can be played in under 2 hours on foot or with a leisurely golf cart. For simulators, time depends on the course and players.

faq.question: Is Pine Meadow kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the Par-3 course is described as perfect for golfers of all ages and skill levels, making it suitable for families.
